member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.CalibrationFactory
member.summary: Calibration Factory.

members.member:
Gets or sets the handler that does TDR calibration.
This property should implement custom getter, the getter should check if the CalibrationHandler is null or not.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.CalibrationFactory.CalibrateFromFile
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the requested calibration is using a file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.CalibrationWithFileHandler
member.summary: This class will handle the calibration process using a file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.ICalibration
member.summary: Class to define extendable methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.ICalibration.IsTiuCalibrated(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Check if the TIU with name specified is calibrated previously.
member.returns: True if the TIU is calibrated.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.ICalibration.DoCalibration(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Command to do TDR calibration on the TIU.
member.param: The name of the Pin Group.
The list of the ignored Pins.
The name of the output TDR calibration file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.ICalibration.StoreCalibrationInfo(System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Method to store the calibration information into the SharedStorage.
member.param: The status of the calibration, True if success, False if failed..
The name of currently docked TIU.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.NewCalibrationProcessHandler
member.summary: This class handles the process to do new TDR calibrations for the TIU.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.TiuCalibrationInfo
member.summary: Calibration criteria for TDR.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.TiuCalibrationInfo.CalibratedPinGroups
member.summary: Gets or sets dictionary of PinGroup -> CalibrationStatus.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.Calibration.TiuCalibrationInfo.DockedTiuName
member.summary: Gets or sets the docked TIU name.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.ExecuteTdrCalibration
member.summary: Setting test method to always or not execute Tdr Calibration.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.ExecuteTdrCalibration.FALSE
member.summary: TestMethod selected to not execute Tdr Calibration.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.ExecuteTdrCalibration.TRUE
member.summary: TestMethod selects to always execute Tdr Calibration.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.LoadFromFile
member.summary: Test method will load the calibration data from file.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.LoadFromFile.FALSE
member.summary: Test method will not load the calibration data from file generated by PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod previously.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.LoadFromFile.TRUE
member.summary: Test method will load the calibration data from file generated by PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod previously.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.TdrHiLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets High limit of the calibration value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.TdrLoLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets Low limit of the calibration value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.PinGroups
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated PinGroups to do TDR calibration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.CustomFileName
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom file name to use. This will be use with each pin group name for the final file name=[TDRFile_{CustomFileName}_{pinGroup}]. If it's empty, the default file name=[TDRFile_{effectiveTiuName}_{pinGroup}] will be used.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.IgnoredPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated IgnoredPins to exclude from TDR calibration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.LoadDataFromFile
member.summary: Gets or sets calibration files for each PinGroups to be calibrated.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.AlwaysExecute
member.summary: Gets or sets AlwaysExecute to do TDR calibration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.TdrOverrides
member.summary: Gets or sets an input file for manually overrides TDR calibration values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.TdrOverrideOptions.PinGroup
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of rail configurations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.TdrOverrideOptions.File
member.summary: Gets or sets TDR overrides file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.PrimeTdrCalibrationTestMethod.TdrOverrideOptions.IgnoredPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of rail configurations.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.TdrResultPrinter
member.summary: IConsolePrintable implementation to do the result printouts.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The TDR Calibration results to be printed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.TdrResultPrinter.Print
member.summary: Prints.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TdrCalibration.TdrResultPrinter.PrintOverride
member.summary: Prints when override from file.
